title: Karma & Life-Purpose Counselling
subtitle: Discover Your Soul Journey and Dharmic Path
description: Explore your soul's journey — understand karmic patterns, life purpose, and Dharmic path through deep Vedic astrological insight.
shortDescription: Explore your soul's journey — understand karmic patterns, life purpose, and Dharmic path through deep Vedic astrological insight.
introduction: At the deepest level, Vedic astrology is not about prediction — it's about understanding the soul's journey. Karma and Life-Purpose Counselling explores the profound questions: Why am I here? What karmic patterns am I carrying? What is my Dharma — my true life path?
overview:
Vedic astrology recognizes three types of karma that shape your life: Sanchita Karma (the accumulated bank of past-life actions), Prarabdha Karma (the portion allocated for this lifetime, reflected in your birth chart), and Kriyamana Karma (the new karma you create through present choices). Your birth chart is essentially a map of your Prarabdha — the karmic lessons, opportunities, and challenges destined for this life.

Pandit Shree Mahadev Joshi draws on 20+ years of experience in Vedic astrology and spiritual consultation to guide you through this profound self-exploration. Through analysis of Rahu and Ketu (the lunar nodes — your karmic axis), Saturn's placement (the karmic taskmaster), the 12th house (past-life patterns), and the 9th house (Dharma and life purpose), Panditji illuminates the deeper spiritual narrative behind your life experiences.

This counselling is particularly valuable during life transitions — when career success feels hollow, relationships repeatedly challenge the same patterns, or a growing inner voice seeks something more meaningful. It provides not just understanding, but actionable steps: remedial practices, meditation techniques, mantras, and lifestyle adjustments that accelerate spiritual growth while honoring your karmic path.
benefits: Clarity on your soul's purpose and Dharmic path
Understanding of recurring life patterns through a karmic lens
Release from confusion during major life transitions
Practical spiritual practices tailored to your chart
Peace through acceptance of karmic lessons
Empowerment through Kriyamana Karma — shaping your future through conscious action

process.title: Deep Chart Analysis
process.description: Focus on karmic indicators — Rahu/Ketu axis, Saturn, 9th and 12th houses, Nakshatras.

process.title: Life Pattern Discussion
process.description: Open conversation about recurring themes, challenges, and questions in your life.

process.title: Karmic Narrative
process.description: Panditji weaves together the astrological insights into a coherent spiritual narrative.

process.title: Dharma Path Guidance
process.description: Specific guidance on aligning daily life with your soul's purpose.

process.title: Spiritual Practices
process.description: Customized mantras, meditation, and remedial actions for spiritual acceleration.

faqs.question: Can I change my karma?
faqs.answer: Prarabdha Karma (this life's allocation) is fixed, but how you respond to it creates Kriyamana Karma — new karma. Through conscious action, spiritual practice, and selfless service, you can mitigate negative karma and build positive karmic credit.

faqs.question: Is this different from a regular Kundli reading?
faqs.answer: Yes. While a Kundli reading covers practical life areas, Karma Counselling goes deeper into the spiritual dimension — past-life patterns, soul purpose, and the 'why' behind your life's circumstances.

faqs.question: Do I need to believe in reincarnation for this to be useful?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. Even without a belief in past lives, the framework of karmic patterns provides valuable insight into recurring behavioral patterns, psychological tendencies, and a sense of life direction.
